name: markdown-drafts
description: Use markdown formatting when drafting content intended for external systems (GitHub issues/PRs, Jira tickets, wiki pages, design docs, etc.) so formatting is preserved when the user copies it.
intent_triggers: use the markdown drafts agent skill
run a workflow for markdown drafts
